other_observers: Dan Maynard, John Maynard; Dan Maynard found the bird and the three of us observed and talked about the differences and what to expect for GlIB x WFIB hybrids.
description: This was a dark ibis. Three of us searched a flock of about 30 birds for one with thin blue edges to the facial skin. My nephew, Dan, found one and asked me to look at it. The bird had thin blue facial skin that reached, but did not surround the dark eye. It had grayish legs with reddish joints. Although I looked, I could not see the exact color of the eye. It appeared to be without any reddish tones.Behaviors: Feed in mud with other dark ibises.Call: grunting growlPlumage: alternate
